summary: A greenfield web app whose only authentication is single sign-on: a user can log in with an external identity provider and log out again.

outcomes.statement: a user can log in via an external SSO identity provider
a logged-in user stays logged in across requests without re-authenticating each time
a logged-in user can log out and their session ends

notes: Greenfield: there is no existing auth, user table, or session handling to build on.
SSO is the ONLY way in — there is no local password login to fall back to.
